patch.value: GH-212: type-default estimate backfill via validate --auto-fix --fix-scope estimates

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Shipped pure module src/core/validate/estimate-defaults.ts (GH-212). Exports: DEFAULT_ESTIMATE_MINUTES_BY_TYPE (Epic 2880, Feature 480, Story 480, Milestone 2880, Task 120, Issue 60, Bug 60, Chore 30, Decision 15, Plan 120), FALLBACK_ESTIMATE_MINUTES=120, resolveEstimateDefaultMinutes(type, overrides?) and normalizeEstimateDefaultOverrides(raw). Precedence: case-insensitive overrides > built-in map > fallback; only finite >0 values honored, results floored to positive ints; normalize trims keys, drops empty/non-positive/non-finite/non-number, floors. Spec tests/unit/validate/estimate-defaults.spec.ts (24 tests) at 100% line/branch/func/stmt. tsc clean. vitest.config.ts: NO line added/needed — coverage include is the broad glob 'src/**/*.ts' (no per-file list exists), which already covers the module.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Integrated by lead: new fix scope 'estimates' (SUPPORTED but NOT default-granted, like lifecycle). fix-planning.planEstimateBackfillFixes(rows, overrides) -> set_estimate kind -> pm update <id> --estimate <n>; applyValidateFix maps set_estimate to runUpdate{estimatedMinutes}. buildMetadataCheck collects estimateBackfillRows (items missing estimated_minutes + type) only when estimated_minutes is an active required field. New setting validation.estimate_defaults_by_type (Record<string,number>) validated via new vRecordOf(vNumber{int,positive}) + normalized via normalizeEstimateDefaultOverrides; persisted order + orderObject updated. MCP fixScope enum + completions + docs updated. Sandbox-verified per-type defaults (Epic 2880/Feature 480/Task 120) + override (Epic->999).

patch.value: Shipped: type-default estimate backfill via validate --auto-fix --fix-scope estimates (GH-212). core/validate/estimate-defaults.ts + fix-planning + settings.
